flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Arkansas Community College-Morrilton rose 25% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.2k → $10.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Arkansas Community College-Morrilton rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $4.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Arkansas Community College-Morrilton rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $3.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Arkansas Community College-Morrilton fell 11% between 2009 and 2010 (7.4% → 6.6%).
